Nullpointer exception for if-else statement having an empty THEN block

 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtBlockExpression
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 30→
 31→/**
 32→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 33→ */
 34→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ) {
 43→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44→
 45→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46→        indentConfig =
 47→            IndentConfig(
 48→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 49→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 50→            )
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54→        node: ASTNode,
 55→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {
 71→            // Allow
 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"
 74→            // } else if (bar2) {
 75→            //     null
 76→            // } else {
 77→            //     null
 78→            // } ?: "something-else"
 79→            return
 80→        }
 81→
 82→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {
 86→            // Allow
 87→            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88→            //     "bar1"
 89→            // } else if (bar2) {
 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }
 96→
 97→        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return
102→            }
103→            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105→                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106→                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107→                return
108→            }
109→
110→            Unit
111→        }
112→
113→        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114→        if (autoCorrect) {
115→            autocorrect(node)
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120→        val prevLeaves =
121→            node
122→                .leaves(forward = false)
123→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124→                .toList()
125→                .reversed()
126→        val nextLeaves =
127→            node
128→                .leaves(forward = true)
129→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130→                .toList()
131→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132→
133→        prevLeaves
134→            .firstOrNull()
135→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136→            ?.let {
137→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138→            }
139→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144→            prevLeaves
145→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146→                .forEach(::addChild)
147→            addChild(previousChild)
148→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151→        }
152→
153→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155→            node
156→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158→        }
159→    }
160→}
161→
162→public val MULTI_LINE_IF_ELSE_RULE_ID: RuleId = MultiLineIfElseRule().ruleId

content.text:
The issue was caused by a `NullPointerException` in `MultiLineIfElseRule` when processing an `if-else` statement where a `THEN` or `ELSE` block had no children (specifically `node.firstChildNode` was null). This occurred in the provided edge case `if ("a" == "b") { } else if ("b" == "c") else { }`, where the `else if` construct resulted in an empty `THEN` block for the inner `if`.

To fix this, I added a null check for `node.firstChildNode` in `beforeVisitChildNodes`. If the node has no children, the rule now safely returns instead of attempting to access properties of a null child.

I verified the fix by creating a new test file `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/MultiLineIfElseRuleReproduceTest.kt` with the reproducing case, and confirmed that it passes and no longer crashes. I also ran the existing tests for `MultiLineIfElseRule` to ensure no regressions were introduced.

**Modified File:**
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/MultiLineIfElseRule.kt`: Added `if (node.firstChildNode == null) { return }` check.

**New Test File:**
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/MultiLineIfElseRuleReproduceTest.kt`: Contains the test case that previously caused the crash.

 31→/**
 32→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 33→ */
 34→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 35→    StandardRule(
 36→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 37→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 38→            setOf(
 39→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 40→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 41→            ),
 42→    ) {
 43→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 44→
 45→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 46→        indentConfig =
 47→            IndentConfig(
 48→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 49→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 50→            )
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 54→        node: ASTNode,
 55→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 56→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 57→    ) {
 58→        if (node.elementType != THEN && node.elementType != ELSE) {
 59→            return
 60→        }
 61→
 62→        // Ignore when already wrapped in a block
 63→        if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→
 67→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 68→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION &&
 69→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 70→        ) {
 71→            // Allow
 72→            // val foo2 = if (bar1) {
 73→            //     "bar1"
 74→            // } else if (bar2) {
 75→            //     null
 76→            // } else {
 77→            //     null
 78→            // } ?: "something-else"
 79→            return
 80→        }
 81→
 82→        if (node.elementType == ELSE &&
 83→            node.firstChildNode?.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 84→            node.firstChildNode.firstChildNode?.elementType == IF
 85→        ) {
 86→            // Allow
 87→            // val foo = if (bar1) {
 88→            //     "bar1"
 89→            // } else if (bar2) {
 90→            //     "bar2"
 91→            // } else {
 92→            //     "bar3"
 93→            // }.plus("foo")
 94→            return
 95→        }
 96→
 97→        if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 98→            if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 99→                // Allow single line for:
100→                // else if (...)
101→                return
102→            }
103→            if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
104→                // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
105→                //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
106→                //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
107→                return
108→            }
109→
110→            Unit
111→        }
112→
113→        emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
114→        if (autoCorrect) {
115→            autocorrect(node)
116→        }
117→    }
118→
119→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
120→        val prevLeaves =
121→            node
122→                .leaves(forward = false)
123→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
124→                .toList()
125→                .reversed()
126→        val nextLeaves =
127→            node
128→                .leaves(forward = true)
129→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
130→                .toList()
131→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
132→
133→        prevLeaves
134→            .firstOrNull()
135→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
136→            ?.let {
137→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
138→            }
139→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
140→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
141→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
142→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
143→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)))
144→            prevLeaves
145→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
146→                .forEach(::addChild)
147→            addChild(previousChild)
148→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
149→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
150→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
151→        }
152→
153→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
154→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
155→            node
156→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
157→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
158→        }
159→    }
160→}
